name: My workers comp was denied after knee injury at work, what now?
description: Appeal via conference or hearing fast.[1]

mainEntity.name: My workers comp was denied after knee injury at work, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal via conference or hearing fast.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Request a Claims Resolution Conference or file for hearing with Industrial Accidents Division.[1] Appeal promptly.[1] Key factors: Gather medical records, witness statements; don't accept denial.[2] Lawyer boosts success rates.[2] Many denials overturned with evidence.[1]
